abilities.name: Wait Then Fire
abilities.description: If none of the 10th Regiment of Foot move this turn, add 1 die to their attack.

abilities.name: Melee Defense 1
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, a Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot adds 1 to his defense dice.

abilities.name: Bayonet Attack 1
abilities.description: When rolling attack dice against an adjacent figure, a Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot adds 1 to his attack dice. A Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot can only use Bayonet Attack if he moved at least one space this turn.

abilities.name: Wait Then FIre
abilities.description: If none of the 4th Massachusetts Line move this turn, add 1 die to their attack.

abilities.name: Valiant Army Defense Bonus
abilities.description: If every Army Card you control has a valiant personality, each soldier in the 4th Massachusetts Line receives 1 additional defense die.

abilities.name: Super Leap
abilities.description: Instead of his normal move, Abomination may Super Leap. Super Leap has a move of 10. When counting spaces for Abomination's Super Leap movement, ignore elevations. Abomination may leap over water without stopping, leap over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. Abomination may not leap more than 50 levels up or down in a single leap. If Abomination is engaged when he starts to leap, he will take any leaving engagement attacks. Abomination rolls 3 less attack dice on any turn that he chooses to Super Leap.

abilities.name: Stomp Special Attack
abilities.description:
Range 1. Attack 3.
Any figure adjacent to Abomination is affected by the Stomp Special Attack. Roll 3 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense separately. Abomination cannot attack using his Stomp Special Attack on the same turn he uses Super Leap.

abilities.name: Leaf of the Home Tree Aura
abilities.description: When any Elf you control within 8 clear sight spaces of Acolarh receives enough wounds to be destroyed, you may roll 10 Ullar Valkyrie dice before removing the figure. If you roll at least 3 Ullar symbols, ignore any wounds that figure just received. Acolarh’s Leaf of the Home Tree Aura does not affect Acolarh.

abilities.name: Ullar's Amulet
abilities.description: All friendly figures who follow Ullar and start their turn adjacent to Acolarh may move 2 additional spaces.

abilities.name: Ghost Walk
abilities.description: Agent Carr can move through all figures.

abilities.name: Sword of Reckoning 4
abilities.description: If Agent Carr is attacking an adjacent figure, add 4 dice to Agent Carr’s attack.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Agent Carr is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When Agent Skahen attacks, she may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Cover Fire
abilities.description: When attacking an opponent’s figure, if Agent Skahen inflicts one or more wounds, you may move one Tricky figure you control who follows Vydar and is within 8 clear sight spaces of Agent Skahen up to 4 spaces. You cannot use Cover Fire to move Agent Skahen.

abilities.name: Stealth Dodge
abilities.description: When Agent Skahen rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, one shield will block all damage.

abilities.name: Swirling Vortex
abilities.description: When an opponent's small or medium figure moves into a space within 2 clear sight spaces of an Air Elemental you control, that figure must end its move there. Figures can never move through any figure affected by Swirling Vortex.

abilities.name: Air Mastery
abilities.description: FIgures that have the Flying or Stealth Flying special power subtract 1 from their defense dice when attacked by an Air Elemental.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for an Air Elemental's movement, ignore elevations. An Air Elemental may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Air Elemental starts to fly, if it is engaged it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Grenade Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Lob 12. Attack 2. Use this power once per game. Start the game with a grenade marker on this card. Remove the grenade marker to throw grenades. One at a time do the following with each Airborne Elite: Choose a figure to attack. No clear line of sight is needed. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by Grenade Special Attack. Roll 2 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

abilities.name: The Drop
abilities.description: Airborne Elite do not start the game on the battlefield. At the start of each round, before you place order markers, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, you may place all 4 Airborne Elite figures on any empty spaces. You cannot place them adjacent to each other or other figures, or on Glyphs.

abilities.name: Overextend Attack
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Alastair MacDirk, you may place a wound marker on Alastair MacDirk and take another turn with him. You may only use this power once during a round.

abilities.name: Turn Undead Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4. Attack 4. Turn Undead Special Attack can be used to attack only Undead figures.

abilities.name: Protection from Evil Aura
abilities.description: All small or medium figures you control within 3 clear sight spaces of Ana Karithon add 1 to their defense against an attack from a figure who follows Utgar. Ana Karithon's Protection from Evil Aura does not affect Ana Karithon.

abilities.name: Healing Word
abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on a wounded small or medium Hero figure you control that is adjacent to Ana Karithon, and before using any other special powers on any Army Card or Glyph, you may first roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, remove up to 2 wound markers from that Hero's Army Card.

abilities.name: Unleashed Fury
abilities.description:
Before moving, roll the 20-sided die.
- If you roll a 1, choose an Anubian Wolf you control and destroy it.
- If you roll a 2-6, add 1 to the Attack value of this card.
- If you roll a 7-11, add 2 to the Attack value of this card.
- If you roll a 12-15, add 3 to the Attack value of this card.
- If you roll a 16-19, add 4 to the Attack value of this card.
- If you roll a 20, add 8 to the Attack value of this card.

abilities.name: Staff of Lerkintin
abilities.description: When defending with Arkmer, add as many defense dice as the number of Elves you control adjacent to Arkmer.

abilities.name: Engagement Strike 13
abilities.description: If an opponent's small or medium figure moves adjacent to Arkmer, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, the opponent's figure receives a wound. Figures may only be targeted as they move into engagement with Arkmer.

abilities.name: Ullar Warlord Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Armoc Vipers, you may first take a turn with any Warlord you control who follows Ullar.

abilities.name: Slither
abilities.description: Armoc Vipers do not have to stop their movement when entering water spaces.

abilities.name: Beast Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Arrow Gruts, you may first take a turn with any Beast you control.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Arrow Gruts are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Wait Then Fire
abilities.description: If none of the Ashigaru Harquebus move this turn, add 1 die to their attack.

abilities.name: Encircle Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 6. If 3 Ashigaru Yari you control are adjacent to the same enemy figure, they may roll their attack dice as one combined attack. The defending figure compares height to the lowest Ashigaru Yari to determine any height advantage. If Encircle Special Attack is used, the 4th figure that moved this turn cannot attack.

abilities.name: Kyrie Leadership
abilities.description: All Kyrie you control, except Atlaga, move one additional space.

abilities.name: Ullar's Bolt of Witherwood
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with Atlaga, you may choose any opponent's figure within 5 clear sight spaces of Atlaga. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-15, nothing happens. If you roll a 16 or higher, the chosen figure is destroyed. Atlaga may attempt to use this power only once per game.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Atlaga's movement, ignore elevations. Atlaga may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Atlaga starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Frenzy
abilities.description: After you take a turn with Aubrien Archers, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, you may take another turn with Aubrien Archers.

abilities.name: Dwarven Strategic Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with The Axegrinders of Burning Forge, you may first take a turn with any Dwarf Hero you control. If you do not take a turn with any Dwarf Hero you control, add 2 to the Axegrinders' Move value.

abilities.name: Fearless Advantage
abilities.description: An Axegrinder of Burning Forge rolls an additional die when attacking or defending against large or huge figures.

abilities.name: Climb X2
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels of terrain, the Axegrinders of Burning Forge may double their height.

abilities.name: Fledgling Acid Breath
abilities.description: Instead of attacking with a Black Wyrmling, you may choose one small or medium figure within 4 clear sight spaces of it. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-10, nothing happens. If you roll an 11-15, the chosen figure receives 1 wound. If you roll a 16 or higher, the chosen figure receives 2 wounds.

abilities.name: Wyrmling Bonding
abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on a Black Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that Black Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for a Black Wyrmling's movement, ignore elevations. A Black Wyrmling may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Black Wyrmling is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Orc Champion Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Blade Gruts, you may first take a turn with any Orc Champion you control.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Blade Gruts are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Gladiatron Movement Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Blastatrons, you may move 4 Gladiatrons you control up to 5 spaces each.

abilities.name: Homing Device
abilities.description: When attacking a non-adjacent figure, add 1 attack die for every Soulborg you control who follows Vydar that is adjacent to the defending figure.

abilities.name: Fledgling Lightning Breath Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4 + Special. Attack 2. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose one other figure within 3 clear sight spaces of the targeted figure to be affected by Fledgling Lightning Breath Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for both figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Fledgling Lightning Breath Special Attack does not affect destructable objects.

abilities.name: Wyrmling Bonding
abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on a Blue Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that Blue Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for a Blue Wyrmling's movement, ignore elevations. A Blue Wyrmling may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Blue Wyrmling is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Sky Watcher
abilities.description: If Brandis Skyhunter is attacking a non-adjacent figure that has the Flying or Stealth Flying special power, add 2 dice to Brandis Skyhunter's attack.

abilities.name: Archer's Glory
abilities.description: Each time Brandis Skyhunter destroys an opponent's non-adjacent Unique Hero, you may take another turn with Brandis Skyhunter.

abilities.name: Tracking
abilities.description: While moving, Brave Arrow may add 2 to his Move value. If he does, he cannot attack this turn.

abilities.name: Scout Melee Attack Enhancement
abilities.description: All friendly Scouts adjacent to Brave Arrow receive an additional attack die wen atacking a figure adjacent to them.

abilities.name: Concealment 10
abilities.description: If Brave Arrow is targeted and receives one or more wounds from an attacking figure who is not adjacent, you must roll the 20-sided die. Count the minimum number of spaces between the attacker and Brave Arrow. Add this number to your die roll. If you roll a 10 or higher, ignore any wounds Brave Arrow just received.

abilities.name: Poisonous Acid Breath
abilities.description: Instead of attacking, you may choose up to 3 different small or medium figures within 4 clear sight spaces of Braxas. One at a time, roll the 20-sided die for each chosen figure. If the chosen figure is a Squad figure and you roll an 8 or higher, destroy it. If the chosen figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 17 or higher, destroy the chosen Hero.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Braxas's movement, ignore elevations. Braxas may fly over water without stopping, pass figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Braxas starts to fly, if she is engaged, she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Carry
abilities.description: Before moving Brunak, choose an unengaged friendly small or medium figure adjacent to Brunak. After you move Brunak, place the chosen figure adjacent to Brunak.

abilities.name: Blood Hungry Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 4. If Brunak's Blood Hungry Special attack destroys a figure, Brunak may attack again with his Blood Hungry Special Attack. Brunak may continue attacking with his Blood Hungry Special Attack until he does not destroy a figure.

abilities.name: Lava Resistant
abilities.description: Brunak never rolls for molten lava or lava field damage and he does not have to stop in molten lava spaces.

abilities.name: Shield Throw Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack 4. When Captain America attacks with his Shield Throw Special Attack, he may attack 2 additional times. He cannot attack the same figure more than once.

abilities.name: Tactician
abilities.description: All friendly figures adjacent to Captain America add 1 extra die to their attack, and 1 extra die to their defense.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure.

abilities.name: Human Gladiator Hero Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with the Capuan Gladiators, you may first take a turn with any Human Gladiator Hero you control.

abilities.name: Initiative Advantage
abilities.description: If all of your order markers are on Gladiator Army Cards, you may add 1 to your initiative roll for every order marker on the Capuan Gladiators' Army Card, up to a maximum of +3 for Initiative Advantage.

abilities.name: Fire Strike Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 6. Attack 2 + Special. When Chardris attacks with Fire Strike Special Attack, add 1 to Chardris' attack dice for every additional Elf Wizard you control within 3 clear sight spaces of Chardris, up to a maximum of +3 dice.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Charos's movement, ignore elevation. Charos may fly over water without stopping. Charos may pass over figures without becoming engaged. Charos may fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Charos starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Knight and Sentinel Enhancement
abilities.description: All friendly Knights and Sentinels adjacent to Concan roll an additional attack die and an additional defense die.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Concan's movement, ignore elevations. Concan may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Concan starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: One Shield Defense
abilities.description: When rolling defense die, if Crixus rolls at least one shield, the most wounds Crixus may take for this attack is one.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: Each time Cyprien Esenwein destroys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Cyprien Esenwein cannot Life Drain destructable objects.

abilities.name: Chilling Touch
abilities.description:
After moving and before attacking, Cyprien Esenwein may attempt a Chilling Touch. To do this, choose a figure adjacent to Cyprien Esenwein and roll the 20-sided die.
- If you roll 1-12, nothing happens.
- If you roll 13-15, the chosen figure receives 1 wound.
- If you roll 16-17, the chosen figure receives 2 wounds.
- If you roll 18-19, the chosen figure receives 3 wounds.
- If you roll a 20 or higher, the chosen figure receives 6 wounds.
Cyprien Esenwein's Chilling Touch does not affect Soulborgs or destructable objects.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Cyprien Esenwein's movement ignore elevations. Cyprien Esenwein may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Cyprien Esenwein starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Sneak Attack 2
abilities.description: If Darrak Ambershard is attacking an opponent's figure that is adjacent to at least one other figure you control, add 2 dice to Darrak Ambershard's attack.

abilities.name: Disarm Traps
abilities.description: When you roll the 20-sided die for a Treasure Glyph trap with Darrak Ambershard, you may add 4 to your die roll.

abilities.name: Hide in Darkness
abilities.description: If Darrak Ambershard is attacked with a normal attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If Darrak Ambershard is on a dungeon space, add 3 to your die roll. If he is on a shadow space, add 6 to your die roll. If you roll 1-15, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 16 or higher, ignore all damage that would be inflicted by the attack.

abilities.name: Ullar Enhanced Rifle Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 10. Attack 1. Choose a non-adjacent small or medium figure to attack. The chosen figure cannot roll defense dice when attacked by Deadeye Dan's Ullar Enhanced Rifle Special Attack. Deadeye Dan may not use this special attack if he moved this turn.

abilities.name: Sharpshooter
abilities.description: Instead of attacking, you may choose any non-adjacent figure within 10 clear sight spaces of Deadeye Dan. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 19 or 20, the chosen figure is destroyed. If you roll a 1-18, you missed. Deadeye Dan may not use this special power if he moved this turn.

abilities.name: Taskmaster Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with the Death Chasers of Thesk, you may first take a turn with any large wild Hero you control.

abilities.name: Orc Battle Rush
abilities.description: At the start of the first round of the game, after all order markers have been placed, you may move all Death Chasers of Thesk you control up to 5 spaces each. They must end their Orc Battle Rush movement on an empty space.

abilities.name: Soul Weapons
abilities.description: Figures attacked by a Death Knight of Valkrill subtract 2 from their defense dice. Destructable objects are not affected by Soul Weapons.

abilities.name: Unholy Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with the Death Knights of Valkrill, you may first take a turn with any small, medium, or large relentless Hero you control.

abilities.name: Scatter
abilities.description: After a Deathreaver you control rolls defense dice against a normal attack from an opponent's figure, you may move any 2 Deathreavers you control up to 4 spaces each.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Deathreavers are never attacked when leaving an engagement

abilities.name: Climb X2
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Deathreavers may double their height.

abilities.name: Maul
abilities.description: When rolling attack dice against a small or medium figure, if a Deathstalker rolls a skull on every die, the defending figure receives a wound for every skull, and cannot roll any defense dice.

abilities.name: Self-Destruct
abilities.description: After moving and instead of attacking, Deathwalker may choose to self-destruct. Roll the 20-sided die to determine if any other figures are wounded. If you roll a 1-3, all adjacent figures are safe. If you roll a 4-15 each adjacent figure receives 2 wounds. If you roll a 16-19, each adjacent figure receives 4 wounds. if you roll a 20, each adjacent figure receives 8 wounds. After using this power, Deathwalker is always destroyed.

abilities.name: Stealth Dodge
abilities.description: When Deathwalker 7000 rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, one sheild will block all damage.

abilities.name: Rapid Fire Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 7. Attack 3. If Deathwalker's Rapid Fire Special Attack inflicts a wound, he may attack again with his Rapid Fire Special Attack. Deathwalker may continue attacking with his Rapid Fire Special Attack until he does not inflict a wound.

abilities.name: Explosion Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 7. Attack 3. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Explosion Special Attack. Deathwalker only needs a clear sight shot at the chosen figure. Roll 3 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Deathwalker can be affected by his own Explosion Special Attack.

abilities.name: Range Enhancement
abilities.description: Any Soulborg Guards you control with a Range number of 4 or more that are adjacent to Deathwalker 9000 add 2 spaces to their range.

abilities.name: Poison Weapons
abilities.description: Each time a Deepwyrm Drow attacks a small, medium, or large Hero with a normal attack or a leaving engagement attack and inflicts at least 1 wound, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-11, nothing happens. If you roll a 12 or higher, add 1 additional wound to the defending figure.

abilities.name: Hide in Darkness
abilities.description: If a Deepwyrm Drow is attacked with a normal attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If that Deepwyrm Drow is on a dungeon space, add 3 to your die roll. If it is on a shadow space, add 6 to your die roll. If you roll 1-15, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 16 or higher, ignore all damage that would be inflicted by the attack.

abilities.name: Mind Exchange 17
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Doctor Doom, you may choose any Unique Hero figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Doctor Doom. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 17 or higher, take temporary control of that Hero and immidiately take a turn with the chosen Hero. At the end of that turn, control of the chosen Hero returns to the player who controlled the Hero before the Mind Exchange. All Order Markers that were on the chosen Hero's card will stay on the card.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Doctor Doom's movement, ignore elevations. Doctor Doom may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Doctor Doom starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Chain Grab
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with a Drow Chainfighter, you may choose one opponent's small or medium figure within 3 clear sight spaces whose base is no more than 6 levels above that Drow Chainfighter's height or 6 levels below that Drow Chainfighter's base. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 9 or higher, place the chosen figure on any empty same-level space adjacent to that Drow Chainfighter. If the chosen figure is engaged when it is moved by Chain Grab, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Hide in Darkness
abilities.description: If a Drow Chainfighter is attacked with a normal attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If that Drow Chainfighter is on a dungeon space, add 3 to your die roll. If he is on a shadow space, add 6 to your die roll. If you roll a 1-15, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 16 or higher, ignore all damage that would be inflicted by the attack.

abilities.name: Road Strength
abilities.description: Add 1 to Dumutef Guard's attack and defense while on a road space.

abilities.name: Devourer Attack Enhancement
abilities.description: All friendly Devourers adjacent to a Dumatef Guard receive an additional attack die.

abilities.name: Glacier Traverse
abilities.description: If a Dzu-Teh is adjacent to a Glacier Mountain, the Dzu-Teh may Glacier Traverse instead of moving normally. You may do this with any or all Dzu-Teh you control each turn. To Glacier Traverse, move to any unoccupied space adjacent to that Glacier Mountain.

abilities.name: Glacier Camouflage
abilities.description: If a Dzu-Teh is adjacent to a Glacier Mountain, opponent's figures must be adjacent to that Dzu-Teh to attack it with a normal attack.

abilities.name: Snow and Ice Enhanced Movement
abilities.description: Slippery Ice and Heavy Snow only count as 1 space when moving.

abilities.name: Crippling Gaze 15
abilities.description: Before moving, you may choose a figure within 5 clear sight spaces of Dund. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher remove all order markers on the chosen figure's army card (or cards if your opponent has more than one common card for that figure).

abilities.name: Earth Slam Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 3. Any non-flying figure adjacent to this Earth Elemental is affected by Earth Slam Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure solls defense dice separately.

abilities.name: Underground Movement
abilities.description: Instead of moving normally with an Earth Elemental, you may immediately place it on any empty non-water space that is within 4 spaces of that Earth Elemental and is no higher than 1 level above that Earth Elemental's height or 3 levels below that Earth Elemental's base. If an Earth Elemental is engaged when it starts its Underground Movement, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When each member of the Einar Imperium attacks, he may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for the Einar Imperium's movement ignore elevations. The Einar Imperium may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a member of the Einar Imperium starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Overextend Attack
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Eldgrim, you may place a wound marker on Eldgrim and take another turn with him. You may use this power only once during a round.

abilities.name: Warrior's Swiftness Spirit
abilities.description: When Eldgrim is destroyed, you may place this figure on any unique Army Card. Eldgrim's spirit adds 1 to the move number on that card.

abilities.name: Slither
abilities.description: Elite Onyx Vipers do not have to stop their movement when entering water spaces.

abilities.name: Frenzy
abilities.description: After you take a turn with Elite Onyx Vipers, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher you may take another turn with Elite Onyx Vipers.

abilities.name: Evasive 8
abilities.description: When an Elite Onyx Viper rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, add 8 defense dice to the defending Viper.

abilities.name: Thunder Ram Assault Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1 + Special. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose up to two other figures within 2 clear sight spaces of the targeted figure to be affected by Thunder Ram Assault Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. You can only use Thunder Ram Assault Special Attack if Eltahale was not adjacent to the targeted figure at the start of this turn. You cannot use Thunder Ram Assault Special Attack if you used Thunder Step this turn.

abilities.name: Thunder Step
abilities.description: Instead of moving Eltahale normally, you may choose an opponent's figure within 5 clear sight spaces of Eltahale. Place Eltahale on any empty space adjacent to the chosen figure. For the duration of Eltahale's turn, add 1 to her attack value. At the end of her turn, roll 1 attack die. If a skull is rolled, place 1 wound marker on Eltahale's Army Card. If Eltahale is engaged when she starts Thunder Step, she will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Elven Summoning Spell
abilities.description:
After moving and before attacking, you may roll the 20-sided die. Add the number of elves you control adjacent to Emirroon to your die roll.
If you roll 1-4, nothing happens.
If you roll 5-11, you may place 1 Elf you control adjacent to Emirroon.
If you roll 12-17, you may place 2 Elves you control adjacent to Emirroon.
If you roll 18 or higher, you may place up to 3 Elves you control adjacent to Emirroon.
If the summoning Elves are engaged, they will not take any leaving engagement attacks. Emirroon cannot summon an Elf that he is already adjacent to.

abilities.name: Gift of the Empress Aura
abilities.description: When you roll defense dice for any Kyrie you control who follows Einar and is within 5 clear sight spaces of Empress Kiova, you may re-roll all defense dice that did not show shields. Gift of the Empress Aura can be used only once for each defense roll. Empress Kiova's Gift of the Empress Aura does not affect Empress Kiova.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Empress Kiova's movement, ignore elevations. Empress Kiova may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Empress Kiova starts to fly, if she is engaged she will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Fire Blast Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack Special. Each time you attack with Erevan Sunshadow's Fire Blast Special Attack, you may choose to roll 2, 3, or 4 attack dice. If a skull is rolled on every die, you may attack again with Erevan Sunshadow's Fire Blast Special Attack. You may continue attacking with Erevan Sunshadow's Fire Blast Special Attack until you do not roll a skull on every die.

abilities.name: Fey Step
abilities.description: Once per game, Erevan Sunshadow may use Fey Step. Before moving normally with Erevan Sunshadow, you may place him on any empty space within 5 spaces of his current location. If Erevan Sunshadow is engaged when he uses Fey Step, he will not take any leaving engagement.

abilities.name: Venom Ray Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack 3. If Estivara inflicts at least 1 wound with Venom Ray Special Attack, roll the 20-sided die for Venom Damage. If you roll a 1-9, the defending figure receives no additional wounds for Venom Damage. If you roll a 10-19, add 1 additional wound marker to the defending figure's Army Card, and roll again for Venom Damage. If you roll a 20, destroy the defending figure.

abilities.name: Lolth's Judgement Aura
abilities.description: All Arachnid figures you control within 6 clear sight spaces of Estivara roll 1 additional attack die when attacking normally.

abilities.name: Cloud of Darkness
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Estivara, you may roll the 20-sided. If you roll a 16 or higher, while she remains on that space, Estivara has no visible Hit Zone until the next time you reveal an order marker.

abilities.name: Double Assault
abilities.description: When Evar Scarcarver attacks an adjacent figure or destructable object, he may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Frost Rage
abilities.description: When revealing a numbered order marker on Evar Scarcarver's Army Card, ou may also reveal an "X" order marker that is on Evar Scarcarver's Army Card to activate Frost Rage for the duration of the round. While Frost Rage is active, add 1 to Evar Scarcarver's Attack and Defense values for each wound marker on his Army Card

abilities.name: Hydra Heads
abilities.description: When this Fen Hydra attacks, it may attack up to 4 times. Reduce the number of times this Fen Hydra can attack by 1 for each wound marker on this Army Card.

abilities.name: Reach
abilities.description: If an opponent's figure is within 2 spaces of this Fen Hydra, and its base is no more than 3 levels above this Fen Hydra's height or 3 levels below this Fen Hydra's base, this Fen Hydra may add 1 to its range when attacking that figure.

abilities.name: Slither
abilities.description: The Fen Hydra does not have to stop its movement when entering water spaces.

abilities.name: Blood Frenzy
abilities.description: When attacking with this Feral Troll, it receives 1 extra attack die for each wound marker on the defending figure's Army Card, to a maximum of 3 additional attack dicde for Bloody Frenzy.

abilities.name: Regenerate
abilities.description: After taking a turn with this Feral Troll, remove 1 Wound Marker from this Feral Troll's Army Card.

abilities.name: Attack Aura 1
abilities.description: All friendly figures adjacent to Finn with a range of 1 add 1 die to their normal attack.

abilities.name: Warrior's Attack Spirit 1
abilities.description: When Finn is destroyed, place this figure on any unique Army Card. Finn's Spirit adds 1 to the normal attack number on that card.

abilities.name: Lava Resistant
abilities.description: A Fire Elemental never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage and it does not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

abilities.name: Searing Intensity
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you must roll the 20-sided die once for each figure adjacent to at least one Fire Elemental you control. If you roll a 14 or higher, that figure receives 1 wound. Figures with the Lava Resistant special power are not affected by Searing Intensity.

abilities.name: Negative Element
abilities.description: A Fire Elemental can never roll defense dice while it is on a water space.

abilities.name: Indomitable
abilities.description: If this Frost Giant of Morh begins its turn unengaged, add 2 to its Move value this turn. If it begins its turn engaged, add 2 to its Attack value this turn.

abilities.name: Battle Frenzy
abilities.description: After attacking with this Frost Giant of Morh, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, you may attack again with this Frost Giant of Morh.

abilities.name: Dying Swipe
abilities.description: If this Frost Giant of Morh is attacked with a normal attack by an opponent's figure and receives enough wounds to be destroyed, roll 3 attack dice. One at a time for each skull rolled, you may inflict 1 wound on any figure that is adjacent to this Frost Giant of Morh. Figures affected by Dying Swipe cannot roll any defense dice and can receive more than 1 wound each. After using Dying Swipe, remove this Frost Giant of Morh from the battlefield.

abilities.name: Climb X3
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Fyorlag Spiders may triple their height.

abilities.name: Entangling Web
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any one small or medium opponent's figure that is engaged with at least three Fyorlag Spiders that you control. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, remove one unrevealed order marker at random from the chosen figure's Army Card (or cards if your opponent has more than one Common Army Card for that figure.

abilities.name: Predator Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Fyorlag Spiders, you may first take a turn with any Predator you control.

abilities.name: Cyberclaw
abilities.description: All small or medium opponent's figures that enter or occupy a space adjacent to an Gladiatron may not move. Figures affected by the Cyberclaw cannot be moved by any special power on an Army Card or Glyph.

abilities.name: Melee Defense 1
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, a Gladiatron adds 1 die.

abilities.name: Mob Attack
abilities.description: When attacking with a Goblin Cutter you control, if the defending figure is engaged with at least 2 other Goblin Cutters you control, it subtracts 2 from its defense dice.

abilities.name: Scurry
abilities.description: When a Goblin Cutter you control is destroyed by a normal attack from an opponent's figure, you may move any 2 Goblin Cutters you control up to 4 spaces each, and all Goblin Cutters you control no longer have any visible Hit Zones for the duration of the attacking figure's turn while they remain unengaged. Goblin Cutters will never take any leaving engagement attacks while using Scurry.

abilities.name: Scale
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels or terrain, Goblin Cutters may add 2 to their height.

abilities.name: Tough
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack, Gorillinators always add one automatic shield to whatever is rolled.

abilities.name: Rock Throw
abilities.description: If a Granite Guardian has a height advantage on an opponent's figure, it may add 2 to its range when attacking that figure.

abilities.name: Landslide
abilities.description: A Granite Guardian with a height advantage on an adjacent opponent's figure rolls an additional attack die when attacking that figure.

abilities.name: Gain High Ground
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Granite Guardians, you may move each Granite Guardian you control up to 1 space. This space may be up to 4 levels higher.

abilities.name: Ice Cold
abilities.description: While a Greater Ice Elemental is on a water or ice space, that space and all same-level water spaces adjacent to that Greater Ice Elemental are considered normal ice spaces. Figures do not have to stop their movement on normal ice spaces.

abilities.name: Ice Spikes 15
abilities.description: If an opponent's figure move adjacent to this Greater Ice Elemental, rol the 20-sided die. If this Greater Ice Elemental is on at least one ice or snow space, add 2 to your die roll. If you roll a 15 or higher, the opponent's figure receives 1 wound. Figures can be affected by Ice Spikes only as they move into engagement with this Greater Ice Elemental.

abilities.name: Cold Healing
abilities.description: After taking a turn with this Greater Ice Elemental, if it is on at least one snow or ice space, remove 1 wound marker from this Greater Ice Elemental's Army Card.

abilities.name: Loyatly to the Lizard King
abilities.description: At the start of the game, choose a Unique Lizardfolk Hero you control, or a Unique large or huge Dragon Hero you control, to be the Greenscale Warrior' Lizard King. A Greenscale Warrior rolls 1 additional attack and defense die when its chosen Lizard King is within 2 clear sight spaces. You can choose only one Lizard King for all the Greenscale Warriors you control.

abilities.name: Lizard King Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with the Greenscale Warriors, you may first take a turn with their chosen Lizard King if it is still under your control.

abilities.name: Chomp
abilities.description: Before attacking, choose one medium or small figure adjacent to Grimnak. If the chosen figure is a Squad figure, destroy it. If the chosen figure is a Hero figure, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, destroy the chosen Hero.

abilities.name: Orc Warrior Enhancement
abilities.description: All friendly Orc Warriors adjacent to Grimnak roll an additional attack die and an additional defense die.

abilities.name: Marro Warlord Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Grok Riders, you may first take a turn with any Marro Warlord you control.

abilities.name: Mark of the Warlord
abilities.description: When attacking a figure that is adjacent to any Marro Warlord you control, Grok Riders add 2 to their attack dice.

abilities.name: Grok Training
abilities.description: Marro Hive cannot rebirth Grok Riders with its Marro Rebirth special power.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When Guilty McCreech attacks, he may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Evil Eye Defense
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from a non-adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure.

abilities.name: Tetsubo Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 3. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose one figure adjacent to the targeted figure to be affected by the Tetsubo Special Attack as well. Roll attack dice once for both figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

abilities.name: Heroic Defense Aura
abilities.description: When defending against a normal attack by an adjacent figure with any Samurai or Ashigaru figures you control within 8 clear sight spaces of Hatamoto Taro, you may roll Einar Valkyrie dice. Each Einar symbol rolled counts as an adiitional shield. Heroic Defense Aura does not affect Hatamoto Taro

abilities.name: Adjacent Tough 1
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice for Hatamoto Taro, if Hatamoto Taro is adjacent to at least one figure you control who follows Einar, add one automatic shield to the defense roll.

abilities.name: Orc Champion Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Heavy Gruts, you may first take a turn with any Orc Champion you control.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Heavy Gruts are never attacked when leaving engagements.

abilities.name: Force Orb Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack 3. Choose an opponent's figure to attack. Each opponent's figure adjacent to the chosen figure is also affected by Force Orb Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

abilities.name: Mage Hand
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with Heirloom, you may choose a Treasure Glyph on an unoccupied space within 4 spaces of Heirloom. You may move that Treasure Glyph on to any empty same-level space adjacent to Heirloom. Symbol-side-up Treasure Glyphs cannot be revealed, and a power-side-up Treasure Glyph must be placed power-side-up when moved by Mage Hand.

abilities.name: Warforged Resolve
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal or special attack, Heirloom always add 1 automatic shield to whatever is rolled.

abilities.name: Expendable Rabble
abilities.description: If a Horned Skull Brute you control is attacked with a normal attack by an opponent's figure and receives 1 or more wounds, you may destroy a small Goblin figure you control that is adjacent to that Horned Skull Brute to ignore any wounds that Horned Skull Brute just received.

abilities.name: Barge Into Battle
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, if a Horned Skull Brute you control ends its movement unengaged, you may choose an engaged small or medium friendly Squad figure within 3 clear sight spaces of that Horned Skull Brute whose base is no more that 2 levels higher or lower than the base or that Horned Skull Brute. You may switch that Horned Skull Brute with the chosen squad figure. Figures moved by Barge Into Battle never take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Ice Troll Charge
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with this Ice Troll Berserker, roll the 20-sided die. If this Ice Troll Berserker is on a snow or ice space, add 3 to your die roll. If you roll a 13 or higher, you may move this Ice Troll Berserker again.

abilities.name: Cold Regenerate
abilities.description: After taking a turn with this Ice Troll Berserker, remove 1 wound marker from this Ice Troll Berserker's Army Card. If it is on a snow or ice space, remove 1 additional wound marker.

abilities.name: Rage Smash 5
abilities.description: When Incredible Hulk attacks using a normal attack he receives one extra attack die for each Wound Marker he has, up to a maximum of 5 extra attack dice for Rage Smash.

abilities.name: Super Leap
abilities.description: Instead of his normal move, Incredible Hulk may Super Leap. Super Leap has a move of 10. When counting spaces for Hulk's Super Leap movement, ignore elevations. Hulk may leap over water without stopping, leap over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. Hulk may not leap more than 50 levels up or down in a single leap. If Hulk is engaged when he starts to leap, he will take any leaving engagement attacks. Hulk rolls 3 less attack dice on any turn that he chooses to Super Leap.

abilities.name: Stomp Special Attack
abilities.description:
Range 1. Attack 3.
Any figure adjacent to Incredible Hulk is affect the Stomp Special Attack. Roll 3 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense separately. Hulk cannot attack using his Stomp Special Attack on the same turn he uses Super Leap.

abilities.name: Iron Tough
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a special attack, this Iron Golem always adds 2 automatic shields to whatever is rolled.

abilities.name: Lava Resistant
abilities.description: This Iron Golem never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and it does not have to stop on molten lava.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When Iron Man attacks, he may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces Iron Man's movement, ignore elevations. Iron Man may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Iron Man starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Vanish 9
abilities.description: If Isamu is attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die to vanish. If you roll 1-8, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 9 or higher, Isamu takes no damage and may immediately move up to 4 spaces. Isamu can vanish only if he ends his vanishing move not adjacent to any enemy figures.

abilities.name: Phantom Walk
abilities.description: Isamu can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Dishonorable Attack
abilities.description: When attackinga figure who follows Jandar, Isamu rolls 2 additional attack dice.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: Each time Iskra Esenwein destoys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Iskra Esenwein cannot Life Drain destructable objects.

abilities.name: Summon the Rechets of Bogdan
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Iskra Esenwein, you may attempt to summon the Rechets of Bogdan if they are in your army and they have not yet been successfully summoned. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you must place all 3 Rechets of Bogdan on empty spaces within 6 clear sight spaces of Iskra Esenwein. Any Rechets or Bogdan that you cannot place on the battlefield are immediately destroyed and cannot be summoned again. When the Rechets of Bogdan are summoned, you may immediately take a turn with them.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Iskra Esenwein's movement, ignore elevations. Iskra Esenwein may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Iskra Esenwein starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

abilities.name: Shotgun Blast Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack 3. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Shotgun Blast Special Attack. James only needs a clear sight shot at the chosen figure. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. James cannot be affected by his own Shotgun Blast Special Attack.

abilities.name: Whip 12
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, choose a small or medium figure adjacent to James. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 12 or higher, the chosen figure cannot roll any defense dice if attacked by James this turn.

abilities.name: Shotgun Blast Special Attack

Johnny only needs a clear sight shot at the chosen figure. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Johnny cannot be affected by his own Shotgun Blast Special Attack.

abilities.name: Rain of Flame Special Attack
