Add 1 to Jorhdawn's attack dice for every additional Elf Wizard you control within 3 clear sight spaces of Jorhdawn, up to a maximum of +3 dice. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each affected figure rolls defense dice separately. Jorhdawn cannot be affected by her own Rain of Flame Special Attack.

abilities.name: Wild Swing Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Wild Swing Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Jotun cannot be affected by his own Wild Swing Special Attack.

abilities.name: Throw 14
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, choose one small or medium non-flying figure adjacent to Jotun. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may throw the figure by placing it on any empty space within 4 spaces of Jotun. The figure must land within clear sight of Jotun. After the figure is placed, roll the 20-sided die for throwing damage. Id you roll an 11 or higher, the thrown figure receives 2 wounds. If the figure is thrown onto a level higher than the height of Jotun or onto water, do not roll for throwing damage. The thrown figure does not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Quick Release Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4. Attack 4. When Kaemon Awa attacks with his Quick Release Special Attack, he may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

abilities.name: Kato Katsuro's Command
Mind Shackle 19
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any unique figure adjacent to Kee-Mo-Shi. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 19 or 20, take control of the chosen figure and that figure's Army Card. You now control that Army Card and all figures on it. Remove any Order Markers on the chosen figure's Army Card. If Kee-Mo-Shi is destroyed, you retain control of any previously Mind Shackled Army Cards.

abilities.name: Toxic Skin
abilities.description: After attacking, you must roll the 20-sided die once for each figure adjacent to Kee-Mo-Shi. If you roll a 17 or higher, that figure receives one wound. Soulborgs are not affected by Toxic Skin.

abilities.name: Healing Touch
abilities.description:
After moving and before attacking, choose a wounded hero figure adjacent to Kelda. Then roll the 20-sided die to add or remove wound markers from the chosen figure's card:
- If you roll 1, add 2 markers.
- If you roll 2-5, remove 1 marker.
- If you roll 6-17, remove up to 2 markers.
- If you roll 18-20, remove all markers.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Kelda's movement, ignore elevations. Kelda may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Kelda starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Relentless Assault
abilities.description: Each friendly figure adjacent to Khosumet with a relentless personality receives an additional attack die.

abilities.name: Unleashed Fury Enhancement
abilities.description: You may add 1 to your die roll when you roll for the Unleashed Fury power on any Army Card.

abilities.name: Human Champion Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with the Knights of Weston, you may first take a turn with any Human Champion you control.

abilities.name: A Coward's Reward
abilities.description: Knights of Weston roll one additional die against figures leaving an engagement with them.

abilities.name: Charging Assault
abilities.description: Any or all Kozuke Samurai may add 3 to their Move number as long as they are unengaged prior to moving. Kozuke Samurai must be able to move adjacent to an opponent's figure in order to use Charging Assault.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

abilities.name: Stealth Dodge
abilities.description: When a Krav Maga Agent rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, one shield will block all damage.

abilities.name: Wounded Smash
abilities.description: When Krug attacks, he receives one extra attack die for each wound marker he has.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When Krug attacks, he may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Ninjutsu Barrage Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 3. Instead of moving and attacking normallhy with Kumiko, you may move Kumiko up to 3 spaces. Kumiko can attack up to 3 times with Ninjutsu Barrage Special Attack at any point before, during, or after this move as long as Kumiko is on a space where she could end her movement. Kumiko cannot attack the same figure more than once on a single turn.

abilities.name: Phantom Walk
abilities.description: Kumiko can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Summon Elemental
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with Kurrok the Elementalist, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll an 11 or higher, you may if possible, place one of your previously destroyed small or medium Elementals on an empty space within 3 clear sight spaces of Kurrok the Elementalist.

abilities.name: Master of the Elements
abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on Kurrok the Elementalist, instead take of taking a turn with Kurrok, you may take a turn with up to three small or medium Elementals you control that are within 8 clear sight spaces of Kurrok the Elementalist.

abilities.name: Strength of Oak Aura 1
abilities.description: All friendly Elves adjacent to Kyntela Gwyn add 1 to their defense dice.

abilities.name: Vydar's Range Enhancement Aura
abilities.description: All friendly figures with a Range number of 4 or more who follow Vydar and are within 4 clear sight spaces of Laglor add 2 to their Range number. Vydar's Range Enhancement Aura does not affect Laglor.

abilities.name: Autoload Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 7. Attack 3. When attacking with Autoload Special Attack, you may roll Vydar Valkyrie dice. If you roll at least one Vydar symbol, you may attack again using Autoload Special Attack.

abilities.name: Highland Fury
abilities.description: At the start of the game, choose a Human Champion you control. While that champion is in play, MacDirk Warriors roll one additional attack die for each wound marker on the chosen hero. There can be only one Human Champion for all the MacDirk Warriors you control. MacDirk Warriors cannot attack their chosen Human Champion

abilities.name: Human Champion Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with the MacDirk Warriors, you may first take a turn with any Human Champion you control.

abilities.name: Machine Pistol Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 7. Attack 2. Major Q10 may use this special attack 4 times in the same turn. Q10 may target the same figure or a different figure with each attack.

abilities.name: Wrist Rocket Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4. Attack 4. Major Q10 may use this special attack 2 times in the same turn. Q10 may target the same figure or a different figure or a different figure with each attack.

abilities.name: Queglix Gun Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 6. Attack 1, 2, or 3. Major Q9 starts each turn with 9 attack dice. Choose any figure within range and attack by rolling 1, 2, or 3 attack dice. Major Q9 may keep making special attacks with 1, 2 or 3 attack dice until he has rolled all 9 attack dice. Major Q9 may target the same of different figures with each attack.

abilities.name: Improved Cyberclaw
abilities.description: All small, medium, or large opponent's figures that enter or occupy a space adjacent to Major X17 may not move. Figures affected by the Cyberclaw cannot be moved by any special power on an Army Card or Glyph.

abilities.name: Melee Defense 4
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, Major X17 adds 4 dice.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: Each time Marcu Esenwein destroys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Marcu Esenwein cannot Life Drain destructable objects.

abilities.name: Eternal Hatred
abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on this card, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 17 or higher, choose an opponent. That opponent will now control Marcu Esenwein for the remainder of your turn, but will not be able to view any unrevealed order markers on this card. At the end of that turn, control of Marcu returns to you. All order markers and figures that were on Marcu's Army Card will stay on his Army Card.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Marcu Esenwein's movement, ignore elevations. Marcu Esenwein may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Marcu Esenwein starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Soldier Leadership
abilities.description: All Soldiers you control move one additional space.

abilities.name: Soldier Attack Enhancement
abilities.description: All friendly Soldiers adjacent to Marcus Decimus Gallus receive an additional attack die.

abilities.name: Wild Pack Movement
abilities.description: Before moving, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-3, add 1 to the move value of this card. If you roll 4-6, add 3 to the move value of this card. If you roll 7-20, add 7 to the move value of this card.

abilities.name: Marro Plague
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you must roll the 20-sided die once for each figure adjacent to any Marrden Hounds you control. If you roll a 16 or higher, that figure receives a wound. Soulborgs and Wulsinu are not affected by this marro plague.

abilities.name: Hivelord Life Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Marrden Nagrubs, you may first take a turn with any Hivelord you control. Before moving the chosen Hivelord, you may destroy one adjacent Marrden Nagrub you control. If you destroy a Marrden Nagrub with Hivelord Life Bonding, remove 1 wound marker from the chosen Hivelord's Army Card.

abilities.name: Climb X2
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Marrden Nagrubs may double their Height.

abilities.name: Cell Divide
abilities.description: When a Marro Divider you control receives one or more wounds from a Normal or Special Attack by an opponent's figure, you may roll the 20-sided die before removing that figure. If you roll a 17 or higher, ignore any wounds that figure just received and, if possible, place one of your previously destroyed Marro Dividers on a same-level spaces adjacent to the defending Marro Divider.

abilities.name: Self-Replicating
abilities.description: Marro Hive cannot rebirth Marro Dividers with its Marro Rebirth special power.

abilities.name: Hive Swarm
abilities.description:
Before moving Marro Drones, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 1-12, you may move and attack with up to 3 Marro Drones you control.
If you roll a 13-16, you may move and attack with up to 6 Marro Drones you control.
If you roll a 17-20, you may move and attack with up to 9 Marro Drones you control.

abilities.name: Swamp Water Strength
abilities.description: When a Marro Drudge is on a swamp water spaces, add 1 to its attack and defense.

abilities.name: Swamp Water Tunnel
abilities.description: If a Marro Drudge ends its normal movement on a swamp water space, you may immediately place it on an any empty same-level swamp water space within 5 spaces. If a Marro Drudge is engaged when it starts to tunnel, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Hive Mind
abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on this Army Card, you may take a turn with any small or medium Common Marro Squad you control before taking a turn with Marro Hive. Any figure that is taking a turn must be within 12 clear sight spaces of Marro Hive prior to its movement.

abilities.name: Marro Rebirth
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Marro Hive, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, you may place any previously destroyed Common Marro Squad figure from your army on an empty space adjacent to Marro Hive.

abilities.name: Stinger Drain
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-4, you must destroy a Marro Stinger you control and you cannot attack this turn. If you roll a 5-9, add 0 to the attack value of this card. If you roll a 10 or higher, add 1 to the attack value of this card.

abilities.name: Water Clone
abilities.description: Instead of attacking with all of the Marro Warriors, one at a time, roll the 20-sided die for each Marro Warrior. If you roll a 15 or higher, place a previously destroyed Marro Warrior on a same-level space adjacent to that Marro Warrior. Any Marro Warrior on a water space needs a 10 or higher to Water Clone. You may only Water Clone after you move.

abilities.name: Master's Influence
abilities.description: All Monk Squad figures you control may leap an additional 13 levels up or down when using their Stealth Leap special power. All Monks you control within 2 clear sight spaces of Master Woo add 1 to their attack dice and 1 to their defense dice.

abilities.name: Master's Assault
abilities.description: Master Woo may attack any or all figures adjacent to him. Roll each attack separately.

abilities.name: Stealth Leap 25
abilities.description: Instead of his normal move, Master Woo may use Stealth Leap 25. Stealth Leap 25 has a move or 3. When counting spaces for Stealth Leap 25, ignore elevations. Master Woo may leap over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. Master Woo may not leap more than 25 levels up or down in a single leap. If Master Woo is engaged when he starts his Stealth Leap 25, he will not take leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Mortal Strike
abilities.description: After attacking an opponent's Unique Hero with this Master of the Hunt's normal attack, roll 1 attack die for each wound inflicted in that attack. For each additional skull rolled, place 1 additional wound marker on the defending figure's Army Card.

abilities.name: Javelin
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with this Master of the Hunt, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, add 3 to this Master of the Hunt's Range value for the duration of its turn.

abilities.name: Paralyzing Stare 16
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, choose any small or medium figure within 6 clear sight spaces of Me-Burq-Sa. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, the chosen figure cannot roll any defense dice if attacked by Me-Burq-Sa this turn.

abilities.name: Poison Cloud
abilities.description: When a Mezzodemon Warmonger attacks a common figure, add 1 to its Attack value.

abilities.name: Exoskeleton
abilities.description: At the start of the game, place 1 copper exoskeleton marker on a Mezzodemon Warmonger figure in your army. After a Mezzodemon Warmonger rolls defense dice against a normal attack, you may remove 1 Exoskeleton marker from its Army Card to ignore all wounds inflicted by that attack.

abilities.name: Stealth Armor 15
abilities.description: When a Microcorp Agent receives one or more wounds, before removing that agent, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, ignore any wounds.

abilities.name: Water Suits
abilities.description: Microcorp Agents do not have to stop their movement when entering a water space. Add 2 to a Microcorp Agent's defense while he is on the water space.

abilities.name: Sighting
abilities.description: When a Microcorp Agent is attacking with a height advantage, he rolls an additional attack die.

abilities.name: Deadly Strike
abilities.description: When attacking with Migol Ironwill, each skull rolled counts as one additional hit.

abilities.name: One Shield Defense
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice, if Migol Ironwill rolls at least one shield, the most wounds Migol Ironwill can take for this attack is one.

abilities.name: Climb X2
abilities.description: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Migol Ironwill may double his Height.

abilities.name: Shadow Ambush
abilities.description: If Mika Connour starts her turn unengaged and on a shadow space, add 3 dice to her attack this turn.

abilities.name: Shadow Dance
abilities.description: If Mika Connour starts her turn on a shadow space, instead of moving normally, you may place her on any other shadow space within 8 spaces of her current location. If Mika Connour is engaged when she starts her Shadow Dance, she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Blend Into Shadow
abilities.description: Mika Connour starts each game with up to 2 shadow tiles on her Army Card. If Mika Connour ends her turn on an empty land space, you may place a shadow tile from her Army Card onto the space she occupies if the shadow tile fits normally onto that space.

abilities.name: Fire Line Special Attack
abilities.description: Range Special. Attack 4. Choose 8 spaces in a straight line from Mimring. All figures on those spaces who are in line of sight are affected by Mimring's Fire Line Special Attack. Roll 4 attack dice once for all affected figures. Affected figures roll defence dice separately.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Mimring's movement, ignore elevations. Mimring may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Mimring starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Psionic Blast Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 3. Attack 3. This Mind Flayer Mastermind does not need clear line of sight to attack with Psionic Blast Special Attack. If a figure receives 1 or more wounds from Psionic Blast Special Attack, remove one unrevealed order marker at random from that figure's Army Card (or cards if you opponent has more than one Common card for the figure).

abilities.name: Enslave 17
abilities.description: When revealing an order marker on this Mind Flayer Mastermind, after taking this Mind Flayer Mastermind's turn, you may choose any Unique Hero figure within 4 clear sight spaces of this Mind Flayer Mastermind. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 17 or higher, take temporary control of the chosen Hero and immediately take a turn with that Hero. At the end of that turn, control of the chosen Hero returns to its previous owner. All order markers that were on the figure's Army Card will stay on the Army Card. Enslave does not affect Mind Flayers.

abilities.name: Utgar's Orders
abilities.description: Instead of taking a turn with Minions of Utgar, you may take a turn with any Kyrie Warrior who follows Utgar.

abilities.name: Deadly Strike
abilities.description: When attacking with Minions of Utgar all skulls rolled count for one additional hit.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for a Minion of Utgar movement, ignore elevations. A Minion of Utgar may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Minion of Utgar starts to fly if he engaged he takes leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Combat Leader
abilities.description: If at least one order marker is on Mogrimm Forgehammer, you may add 3 to your initiative roll.

abilities.name: Commander's Strike
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with Mogrimm Forgehammer, you may choose any opponent's figure within 5 clear sight spaces that is engaged with any other figure you control. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, the chosen figure receives 1 wound.

abilities.name: Tough
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack, Mogrimm Forgehammer always adds 1 automatic shield to whatever is rolled.

abilities.name: Battle Fury
abilities.description: If a Mohican River Tribesman is engaged, add 1 to his attack dice and 2 to his defense dice.

abilities.name: Way Cry
abilities.description: After taking a turn with the Mohican River Tribe, if at least two Mohican River Tribesmen you control are engaged, you may immediately take a turn with one Unique Tribesman Hero you control.

abilities.name: Concealment 19
abilities.description: If a Mohican River Tribesman you control is targeted and receives one or more wounds from an attacking figure who is not adjacent, you must roll the 20-sided die. Count the minimum numer of spaces between the attacker and the Mohican River Tribesman. Add this number to your die roll. If you roll a 19 or higher, ignore any wounds the Mohican River Tribesman just received.

abilities.name: Burning Breath Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4 + Special. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose 4 spaces in a straight line from the targeted figure. All figures on those spaces that are within line of sight of Moltenclaw are affected by Burning Breath Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Moltenclaw is not affected by Burning Breath Special Attack.

abilities.name: Lava Resistant
abilities.description: Moltenclaw never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and he does not have to stop in molten lava spaces.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Moltenclaw's movement, ignore elevations. Moltenclaw may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Moltenclaw starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Phantom Walk
abilities.description: Moriko can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Saber Storm Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 1, 2, or 3. Moriko starts each turn with 6 attack dice. Choose any adjacent figure and attack by rolling 1, 2, or 3 attack dice. Moriko may keep making special attacks with 1, 2, or 3 attack dice until she has rolled all 6 attack dice. Moriko may target the same or different figures with each attack.

abilities.name: Rod of Negation
abilities.description: Start the game with 3 brown Negation markers on this card. At the end of the turn, if you have at least 1 Negation Marker on this card, you may choose any opponent's unique figure within 6 clear sight spaces of Morsbane. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-15, nothing happens. If you roll a 16-19, place a Negation Marker on the chosen figure's Army Card. All of that figure's special powers are negated for the entire game. If you roll a 20, destroy the chosen figure.

abilities.name: Smoke Powder 13
abilities.description: When any Nakita Agent you control, or any figure you control that is adjacent to any Nakita agent you control, is targeted for a normal attack from a non-adjacent opponent, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, all Nakita Agents you control and all figures you control that are adjacent to those agents, no longer have any visible hit zones for the duration of the targeting figure's turn.

abilities.name: Engagement Strike 15
abilities.description: If an opponent's small or medium figure moves adjacent to a Nakita Agent, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, the opponent's figure receives a wound. Figures may be targeted only as they move into engagement with a Nakita Agent.

abilities.name: Gorillinator Movement Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Nakita Agents, you may move 3 Gorillanators you control up to 7 spaces.

abilities.name: Mind Shackle 20
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any unique figure adjacent to Ne-Gok-Sa. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 20, take control of the chosen figure and that figure's Army Card. You now control that Army Card and all figures on it. Remove any Order Markers on this card. If Ne-Gok-Sa is destroyed, you retain control of any previously Mind Shackled Army Card.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Nerak is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Orc Defense Aura 1
abilities.description: All orc figures you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Nerak add 1 to their defense dice. Nerak's Orc Defensive Aura does not affect Nerak.

abilities.name: Snow Strengh
abilities.description: Add 1 to Nerak's attack and defense while on a snow space.

abilities.name: Ice Shard Breath Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack 4. When Nilfheim attacks with his Ice Shard Special Attack, he may attack 2 additional times. He cannot attack the same figure more than once.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Nilfheim's movement, ignore elevations. Nilfheim may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Nilfheim starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Disappearing Ninja
abilities.description: If a Ninja of the Northern Wind is attacked with a normal attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die to disappear. If you roll 1-11, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 12 or higher, that Ninja of the Northern Wind takes no damage and instead may move up to 4 spaces. Ninjas of the Northern Wind can disappear only if they end their disappearing move not adjacent to any enemy figures.

abilities.name: Ghost Walk
abilities.description: Ninjas of the Northern Wind can move through all figures.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Ninjas of the Northern Wind are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Lava Resistant
abilities.description: Obsidian Guards never roll for molten lava damage or lava field damage and they do not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

abilities.name: Lava Throw
abilities.description: When an Obsidian Guard is on a molten lava spaces it may add 2 to its range.

abilities.name: Water Weakness
abilities.description: An Obsidian Guard on a water space rolls 2 fewer defense dice.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When this Ogre Pulverizer attacks, he may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Lumbering Bully
abilities.description: When attacking with this Ogre Pulverizer, all excess shields rolled by the defending figure count as unblockable hits inflicted by the defending figure on this Ogre Pulverizer.

abilities.name: Flail Hurricane
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with this Ogre Warhulk, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-10, it may attack normally. If you roll an 11 or higher, instead of attacking normally, it must attack each figure adjacent to it, if possible. Roll each attack separately.

abilities.name: Mine!
abilities.description: When you roll the 20-sided die for a Treasure Glyph trap with this Ogre Warhulk, you must subtract 4 from your roll.

abilities.name: Circuitry Overload
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you must roll the 20-sided once for each Soulborg figure adjacent to any Omnicron Repulsor you control. If the figure is a Squad figure and you roll a 13 or higher, destroy that figure. If the figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 16 or higher, that figure receives a wound. Omnicron Repulsors are not effected by Circuitry Overload.

abilities.name: Targeting Beacon
abilities.description: When attacking a non-adjacent figure, all Soulborg figures you control who follow Jandar add 1 die to their attack if at least one Omnicron Repulsor you control is adjacent to the defending figure.

abilities.name: EMP Response
abilities.description: If an Omnicron Repulsor you control successfully defends against an attack by a Soulborg figure, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, the attacking figure must immediately end its turn and all order markers must be removed from its Army Card (or cards if you opponent has more than one Common Army Card for the figure).

abilities.name: Deadly Shot
abilities.description: When attacking with Omnicron Snipers, all skulls rolled count for one additional hit.

abilities.name: Red Flag of Fury Aura
abilities.description: If order marker 1 is placed on Ornak, then instead of taking that turn with Ornak, you may take a turn with up to 2 Unique Heroes you control who follow Utgar. Ornak cannot be one of the 2 Unique Heroes. Any Unique Hero that is taking a turn instead of Ornak must be within 8 clear sight spaces of Ornak prior to its movement.

abilities.name: Orc Battle Cry Aura
abilities.description: When attacking with any Orc Warrior figures you control within 2 clear sight spaces of Ornak, you may roll Utgar Valkyrie dice. Each Utgar symbol rolled counts for an additional skull.

abilities.name: Acid Spray Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 4. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose up to two other figures adjacent to the targeted figure to be affected by Acid Spray Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

abilities.name: Lurking Ambush
abilities.description: If Othkurik starts his turn unengaged and on at least one shadow or swamp water space, for this turn add 1 to Othkurik's movement and add 3 to his attack value.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Othkurik's movement, ignore elevations. Othkurik may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If Othkurik is engaged when he starts to fly, he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Tricky Speed 4
abilities.description: If Otonashi starts her turn adjacent to any figure you control who has a tricky personality, she may move 4 additional spaces.

abilities.name: Phantom Walk
abilities.description: Otonashi can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Attack the Wild 2
abilities.description: When attacking a figure who has a wild personality, Otonashi rolls 2 additional attack dice.

abilities.name: Disciplined Influence
abilities.description: At the start of the game, you may choose any unique Army Card you control. For this game the chosen card's personality is disciplined, regardless of what is listed on the card.

abilities.name: Sacred Band Defy Death 15
abilities.description: When an adjacent Sacred Band figure receives one or more wounds, roll the 20-sided die before removing that figure. If you roll a 15 or higher, ignore any wounds.

abilities.name: Lolth's Wrath Special Attack
abilities.description: Range Special. Attack 3. Choose a Drow figure you control that is within 5 clear sight spaces of Pelloth and roll 3 attack dice. One at a time for each skull rolled, you may inflict 1 wound on any small or medium figure that is within 2 clear sight spaces of the chosen Drow figure. You may inflict more than 1 wound on a single figure using Lolth's Wrath Special Attack. Figure affected by Lolth's Wrath Special Attack cannot roll any defense dice. After attacking with Lolth's Wrath Special Attack, destroy the chosen Drow figure.

abilities.name: Lurk in the Shadows
abilities.description: If Pelloth is on a shadow space, opponent's figures must be adjacent to attack him with a normal attack.

abilities.name: Insubstantial 3
abilities.description: A Phantom Knight adds 3 additional defense dice when rolling defense against a normal attack from a figure who is not adjacent.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for a Phantom Knight's movement, ignore elevations. A Phantom Knight may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Phantom Knight is engaged when it starts to fly, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Combined Arbalest
abilities.description: When attacking with a Protector of Ullar, roll 1 additional attack die for every wound that has been inflicted on the defending figure this turn by Protectors of Ullar you control.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for a Protector of Ullar's movement, ignore elevations. A Protector of Ullar may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Protector of Ullar starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Feral Rage
abilities.description: When a Quasatch Hunter attacks, it may attack up to 2 additional times. A Quasatch Hunter cannot attack the same figure more than once per turn.

abilities.name: Techno Hatred
abilities.description: When attacking a Soulborg figure, Quasatch Hunters receive 1 additional attack die.

abilities.name: Jungle Tracking
abilities.description: If a Quasatch Hunter begins its turn adjacent to an Evergreen Tree or Jungle Piece, it may move 2 additional spaces.

abilities.name: Defensive Aura
abilities.description: All figures you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Raelin add 2 to their defense dice. Raelin's Defensive Aura does not affect Raelin.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Raelin's movement, ignore elevations. Raelin may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Raelin starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Whirlwind Assaut
abilities.description: Raelin may attack any or all figures adjacent to her. Roll each attack separately.

abilities.name: Extended Defensive Aura
abilities.description: All figures you control within 6 clearsight spaces of Raelin add 1 to their defense dice. Raelin's Extended Defensive Aura does not affect Raelin.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Raelin's movement, ignore elevations. Raelin may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Raelin starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Iskra's Summoning
abilities.description: Rechets of Bogdan do not start the game on the battlefield. They must be summoned onto the battlefield by Iskra Esenwein.

abilities.name: Lethal Sting
abilities.description: When rolling attack dice against a small or medium figure, if a Rechet of Bogdan rolls a skull on every die, the defending figure cannot roll any defense dice and is immediately destroyed.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Rechets of Bogdan's movement, ignore elevations. Rechets of Bogdan may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Rechet of Bogdan starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Master Manipulator
abilities.description: After revealing an Order Marker on Red Skull's card, instead of taking that turn with Red Skull, you may take a turn with any Unique Hero you control within clear sight of Red Skull.

abilities.name: Dust of Death
abilities.description:
After moving and before attacking you may either:
Roll the 20-sided die for each figure adjacent to Red Skull, or
Roll the 20-sided die once for any one figure up to 3 clear sight spaces away.
If you roll a 19 or higher, that figure is destroyed.

abilities.name: Fledgling Fires Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack 3. Common Squad figures roll 2 fewer defense dice against Fledgling Fires Special Attack.

abilities.name: Wyrmling Bonding
abilities.description: After revealing an order marker on a Red Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that Red Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for a Red Wyrmling's movement, ignore elevations. A Red Wyrmling may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becomeing engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Red Wyrmling is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Net Trip 14
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, any small or medium figure attacked by Retarius this turn may roll no more than 1 die for defense.

abilities.name: Dragon Breath Special Attack
abilities.description: Range Special. Attack 3. Choose 3 spaces in a straight line from Rhogar Dragonspine. All figures on those spaces that are in line of sight are affected by Dragon Breath Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figures rolls defense dice separately.

abilities.name: Lay on Hands
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with Rhogar Dragonspine, you may choose a wounded friendly Hero figure adjacent to Rhogar Dragonspine and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 6 or higher, remove 1 wound marker from the chosen figure's Army Card.

abilities.name: Arrow Volley Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 6. Attack 6. Three unengaged adjacent Roman Archers on the same level may combine their attacks and roll their attack dice as one attack. All Roman Archers in the Arrow Volley must have a clear line of sight on the one target.

abilities.name: Warlord Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Roman Legionnaires, you may first take a turn with any Warlord you control.

abilities.name: Shield Wall
abilities.description: When defending with a Roman Legionnaires, add 1 defense die for each other adjacent Roman Legionnaire up to a maximum of +2 dice, for the Shield Wall power.

abilities.name: Helm of Mitonsoul Aura
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, Runa may use her Helm of Mitonsoul Aura. When using the Helm of Mitonsoul Aura, you must roll the 20-sided die for all figures within 3 clear sight spaces of Runa, one at a time. If you roll a 20, destroy the figure. Runa's Helm of Mitonsoul Aura does not affect Runa.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Runa's movement, ignore elevations. Runa may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Runa starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Einar Warlord Bonding
abilities.description: Before taking a turn with Sacred Band, you may first take a turn with any Warlord you control who follows Einar.

abilities.name: Disciplined Army Defense Bonus
abilities.description: If every Army Card you control has a disciplined personality, each soldier in the Sacred Band receives 1 additional defense die.

abilities.name: Blood Frenzy
abilities.description: When attacking with a Sahuagin Raider, it receives 1 extra attack die for each wound marker on the defending figure's Army Card, to a maximum of 3 additional attack dice for Blood Frenzy.

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: While a Sahuagin Raider is on a water space, add 2 to its Defense. If a Sahuagin Raider starts its turn on a water space, add 1 to its movement for that turn. A Sahuagin Raider does not have to stop its movement when entering a water space.

abilities.name: Fire and Rush Special Attack
abilities.description:
Range Special. Attack Special.
If Samuel Brown begins his turn unengaged, instead of moving and attacking normally, he may use his Fire and Rush Special Attack. Choose a figure within 5 spaces of Samuel Brown to attack and roll 3 attack dice. If the defending figure receives one or more wounds from that attack, you may move Samuel Brown up to 5 spaces. If Samuel Brown ends that move engaged, he may attack again by rolling 4 attack dice.

abilities.name: Spear of Summoning
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, choose any figure you control on the battlefield, then roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-8, nothing happens. If you roll a 9-20, move the chosen figure to any space adjacent to Saylind. If the summoned figure is engaged, the figure does not receive any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Saylind's movement, ignore elevations. Saylind may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Saylind starts to fly, if she is engaged, she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Shields of Valor
abilities.description: When defending with Sentinels of Jandar, each shield rolled counts for one additional block.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Sentinels Jandar's movement ignore elevations. Sentinels of Jandar may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Sentinel of Jandar starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Thorian Speed
abilities.description: Opponent's figures must be adjacent to Sgt. Drake Alexander to attack him with a normal attack.

abilities.name: Grapple Gun 25
abilities.description: Instead of Sgt. Drake Alexander's normal move, he may move only one space. This space may be up to 25 levels higher. When using the Grapple Gun, all engagement rules still apply.

abilities.name: Thorian Speed
abilities.description: Opponent's figures must be adjacent to Sgt. Drake Alexander to attack him with a normal attack.

abilities.name: Grapple Arm
abilities.description: Instead of his normal move, Sgt. Drake Alexander may use his Grapple Arm. Grapple Arm has a move of 4. When counting spaces for Grapple Arm, ignore elevations. Drake may grapple over water without stopping, over figures without becoming engaged, and over obstacles such as ruins. Drake may not grapple more than 45 levels up or down in a single Grapple Arm move. If Drake is engaged when he starts his Grapple Arm move, he will take any leaving engaegment attacks.

abilities.name: Pistol Fire Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack 3. Drake may not use Pistol Fire Special Attack to attack a figure who follows Jandar.

abilities.name: Soul Devour
abilities.description: Before moving, each Shade of Bleakewoode you control may choose an adjacent Unique Hero. Roll the 20-sided die once for each Shade. If you roll 19 or 20, destroy the Shade of Bleakewoode figure, then take control of the chosen Unique Hero and remove any Order Marker on it's card. You now control that Army Card.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Shades of Bleakewoode's movement, ignore elevations. Shades of Bleakewoode may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without being engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Shade of Bleakewoode starts to fly, if it is engaged it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Shaolin Assaut
abilities.description: A Shaolin Monk may attack any or all figures adjacent to him. Roll each attack separately.

abilities.name: Stealth Leap
abilities.description: Instead of their normal move, any or all Shaolin Monks may Stealth Leap. Stealth Leap has a move of 3. When counting spaces for a Monk's leaping movement, ignore elevations. A Monk may leap over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. A Monk may not leap more than 12 levels up or down in a single leap. If a monk is engaged when he starts to leap, he does not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Arcane Bolt Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5 + Special. Attack 3. The first target of Arcane Bolt Special Attack must be within a Range of 5. After attacking with Arcane Bolt Special Attack, if the defending figure receives at least 1 wound, you may choose a figure that was adjacent to the defending figure at the beginning of the attack and attack that chosen figure with Arcane Bolt Special Attack. You may continue attacking with Arcane Bolt Special Attack in this manner until you fail to inflict a wound. A figure cannot be attacked more than once in a turn with Arcane Bolt Special Attack.

abilities.name: Arcane Riposte
abilities.description: When Sharwin Wildborn rolls defense dice against a normal attack, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure.

abilities.name: Shocking Grasp
abilities.description: When rolling attack dice for a normal attack, Sharwin Wildborn always adds 1 automatic skull to whatever is rolled.

abilities.name: Concentrated Will
abilities.description: If Shiori has only one unrevealed order marker on her Army Card, add 1 to her attack and defense.

abilities.name: Phantom Walk
abilities.description: Shiori can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Shuriken Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 5. Attack Special. If Shiori is attacking a small or medium figure, roll 3 attack dice for Shuriken Special Attack. If Shiori is attacking a figure of a different size, roll 2 attack dice for Shuriken Special Attack.

abilities.name: Sweeping Sword Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 5. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to both Shurrak and the chosen figure are also affected by Sweeping Sword Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

abilities.name: Knockback 14
abilities.description: When a small or medium figure rolls defense dice and is not destroyed by a normal or special attack by Shurrak, immediately roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may Knockback the figure by placing it on any empty spaces within 3 clearsight spaces of Shurrak. The space must be on the same level as or lower than its current location. A figure moved by Knockback never takes any leaving engagement attacks. A non-flying figure moved lower by Knockback can receive any falling damage that may apply.

abilities.name: Lava Resistant
abilities.description: Shurrak never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and he does not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

abilities.name: Crag of Steel
abilities.description: When revealing a numbered order marker on Siege's Army Card, you may also reveal an "X" order marker that is on Siege's Army Card to activate Crag of Steel for the duration of the round. While Crag of Steel is active, add 3 to Siege's Defense value and subtract 2 from Siege's Attack and Move values. When Siege attacks while Crag of Steel is active, he may attack any or all figures adjacent to him. Roll each attack separately.

abilities.name: Stealth Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Silver Surfer's movement, ignore elevations. Silver Surfer may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Silver Surfer starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Cosmic Force Blast Special Attack
abilities.description:
Range 6. Attack 6.
If an opponent's Unique Hero receives at least one wound from Cosmic Force Blast Special Attack, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, you may remove one unrevealed order marker from that Unique Hero's Army Card.

abilities.name: Hyper Speed 5
abilities.description: After taking a turn with Silver Surfer, Silver Surfer may move up to 5 spaces. Silver Surfer cannot use Hyper Speed 5 if he attacked with his Cosmic Force Blast Special Attack during that turn.

abilities.name: A Coward's Reward
abilities.description: Sir Denrick rolls one additional die against each figure leaving an engagement with him.

abilities.name: Giant Killer
abilities.description: When Sir Denrick attacks huge figures, add 2 attack dice.

abilities.name: Knight's Courage
abilities.description: Add 1 to Sir Dupuis' attack dice for every Knight you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Sir Dupuis up to a maximum of +3 dice.

abilities.name: Tactical Disengagement 7
abilities.description: When Sir Dupuis receives one or more wounds from a leaving engagement attack, immediately roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 7 or higher, ignore any wounds from that leaving engagement attack.

abilities.name: Chalice of Fortitude
abilities.description: If Sir Dupuis has 4 or more wounds on his Army Card, add 1 to his defense dice.

abilities.name: Jandar's Dispatch
abilities.description: After you take a turn with Sir Gilbert, you may roll 12 Jandar Valkyrie dice. Move up to 4 squad figures you control who follow Jandar up to X spaces. X equals the number of Jandar symbols rolled. Any squad figures moved with Jandar's Dispatch must be within 8 clear sight spaces of Sir Gilbert prior to moving.

abilities.name: Attack Aura 1
abilities.description: All friendly figures adjacent to Sir Gilbert with a range of 1 add 1 die to their normal attack.

abilities.name: Blind Rage Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 3. If Sir Hawthorn rolls at least 2 skulls with his Blind Range Special Attack Sir Hawthorne may attack again with his Blind Rage Special Attack. Sir Hawthorne may continue attacking with his Blind Rage Special Attack until he rolls fewer than 2 skulls.

abilities.name: Stab in the Back
abilities.description: After you take a turn with Sir Hawthorne, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1, choose an opponent. That opponent now controls Sir Hawthorne. Remove any order markers on this Army Card, then give the card to that opponent.

abilities.name: Dragon Healing
abilities.description: Before moving, you may choose a wounded Hero figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sonlen. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, remove one wound marker from the chosen Hero's Army Card. Sonlen's Dragon can use its Dragon Healing on Sonlen.

abilities.name: Dragon Swoop
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sonlen. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, the chosen figure receives one wound.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: Each time Sonya Esenwein destoys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Sonya Esenwein cannot Life Drain destructable objects.

abilities.name: Eternal Strength
abilities.description: Anytime you roll the 20-sided die for Cyprien Esenwein's Chilling Touch, you may add 2 to your die roll.

abilities.name: Eternal Heartbreak
abilities.description: If you control Cyprien Esenwein and he is destroyed, Sonya Esenwein immediately receives 2 wounds.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When couting spaces for Sonya Esenwein's movement, ignore elevations. Sonya Esenwein may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Sonya Esenwein starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Gladiator Inspiration
abilities.description: If all Order Marker for a round are placed on Gladiator Army Cards, and at least one Order Marker is placed on Spartacus, then all Gladiators you control (except Spartacus) become inspired. Inspired Gladiators add one to their Move number and 1 extra attack and defense die for the rest of the round.

abilities.name: Spidey-Sense 11
abilities.description: If Spider-Man is attacked by an opponent's figure and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 1-10, roll defense dice normally. If you roll an 11-20, Spider Man takes no damage and may immediately move using his Swing Line 4 Special Power.

abilities.name: Swing Line 4
abilities.description: Instead of a normal move, Spider-Man may use his Swing Line. Swing Line has a move of 4. When counting spaces for Spider-Man's Swing Line movement, ignore elevations. Spider-Man may swing over water without stopping, swing over figures without becoming engaged, and swing over obstacles such as ruins. Spider-Man may now Swing Line more than 40 levels up or down in a single Swing Line. If Spider-Man is engaged when he starts to Swing-Line, he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Web Special Attack
abilities.description:
Range 4. Attack 3.
Figures roll 1 less defense die when defending against Spider-Man's Web Special Attack.

abilities.name: Hive Supremacry
abilities.description: Anytime you roll the 20-sided die for a Marro or Wulsinu Army Card, you may add 1 to your die roll.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Su-Bak-Na's movement, ignore elevation. Su-Bak-Na may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Su-Bak-Na starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Stare of Stone
abilities.description: Instead of attacking, choose any figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sudema. Roll the 20-sided die. If the chosen figure is a Squad figure and you roll a 7 or higher, destroy it. If the chosen figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 17 or higher, destroy the chosen Hero.

abilities.name: Poison Sting Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 4. If Sujoah inflicts at least 1 wound with Poison Sting Special Attack, roll the 20-sided die for Poison Damage. If you roll a 1-9, the defending figure receives no additional wounds for Poison Damage. If you roll a 10-19, add 1 additional wound marker to the defending figure's Army Card, and roll again for Poison Damage. If you roll a 20, destroy the defending figure.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Sujoah's movement, ignore elevations. abilities.description: When counting spaces for Taelord's movement, ignore elevations. Taelord may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. *When Taelord starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.*

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack fron an adjacent figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

abilities.description: For every opponent's figure a Tagawa Samurai destroys, place a purple Experience Marker on this card. When attacking with Tagawa Samurai, roll one additional attack die for each Experience Marker on this card. A maximum of 3 Experience Markers can be placed on this card.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

abilities.name: Flying
abilities.description: When counting spaces for Thanos' movement, ignore elevations. If the wound destroys the figure, move Tor-Kul-Na on the space that the figure occupied, and you may continue Tor-Kul-Na's movement. If the chosen figure is not destroyed, Tor-Kul-Na's movement ends. Tor-Kul-Na must be on a space where he can end movement each time he uses this power.

abilities.name: Battleaxe

abilities.name: Teleport Reinforements
abilities.description: When Tul-Bak-Ra receives one or more wounds from an opposing figure's Normal or Special Attack but is not destroyed, you may choose one friendly Marro Squad figure for every wound Tul-Bak-Ra just received. After switching spaces, the Warforged Soldier must continue with the attack, if possible, and cannot attack an other figure this turn. Figures moved by Tactical Switch never take any leaving engagement attacks. An opponent's figure may be moved by Tactical Switch only once per turn.

abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal or special attack, a Warforged Soldier always adds 1 automatic shield to whatever is rolled.

Lycanthropy never affects Constructs, Lycanthropes, Soulborgs, and destructable objects.

If you roll an 11 or higher, you may first take a turn with any Hybrid Hero in play. If you take a turn with an opponent's Hybrid Hero, you control that Hero for the duration of its turn. At the end of its turn, control of the Hybrid Hero returns to its previous owner. All order markers that were on the figure's Army Card will stay on the Army Card.

If a White Wyrmling is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

If the figure is destroyed, immediately place the attacking Wolf on the space the figure occupied. If the figure is not destroyed, destroy the attacking Wolf.

abilities.name: Talon Grab
abilities.description: While this Wyvern is flying, you may choose one opponent's small or medium figure that it passed over this turn. Place the chosen figure on an empty same-level space adjacent to this Wyvern at the end of its move. If the chosen figure is engaged when it is moved by Talon Grab, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks. Figures under overhangs can never be moved by Talon Grab.

Zelrig cannot be affected by his own Majestic Fires Special Attack.

abilities.name: Zombie Onslaught Special Attack
abilities.description: Range 1. Attack 6. Three Zombies of Morindan on the same level may combine their attacks. All Zombies of Morindan in the attack must be engaged to the targeted figure.

abilities.name: Zombies Rise Again

Newly places Zombies of Morindan cannot attack this turn. Undead are not affected by Zombies Rise Again.

After each attack, if that was the first time you attacked the defending figure this turn, you may move one Pirate or Captain figure you control up to 4 spaces. You may not move the same figure more than once in a turn using Boarding Party Special Attack.

abilities.name: Charge!!!

Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Do not place Consume Markers on this Army Card while using Soul Fury Special Attack. abilities.name: Terrifying Aura

abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with Drake, you may choose one enemy Small or Medium figure within 4 clear sight spaces whose level is no more than 6 levels above or below Drake's level. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll an 8 or higher, place the chosen figure on an empty same-level space adjacent to Drake. If the chosen figure is engaged when it is moved by Grapple Grab, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Ninjutsu Mastery Special Attack
abilities.description:
Range 1. Attack 2 + Special.
If Shiori did not move normally, she may attack with Ninjutsu Mastery Special Attack up to three times. Before each attack, you must choose an enemy figure within 2 clear sight spaces of Shiori not more than 6 levels above or below Shiori's level, and place her on an empty space adjacent to that figure. When attacking with Ninjutsu Master Special Attack, Shiori rolls 2 attack dice, or 3 attack dice if Shiori has exactly one unrevealed Order Marker on her Army Card.

abilities.name: Kieru 14
abilities.description: If Shiori is attacked with a normal or special attack and receives 1 or more wounds, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may place Shiori on an empty space within 2 spaces or Shiori that is not more than 6 levels above or below Shiori's level. If you do, ignore all wounds just received.

abilities.name: Phantom Walk
abilities.description: Shiori can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: First Assault 2
abilities.description: When Cornelius Breech, the Derelict Prince attacks, if the defending figure was not adjacent to him at the start of this turn, Cornelius adds 2 to his Attack Value during the attack.

abilities.name: Mutiny
abilities.description: After a Unique Captain you control receives a wound or is destroyed, any or all Pirate Squads you control that chose Captain for The Captain's Way Special Power may choose Cornelius to be their chosen Captain for the rest of the game. If any Squads do, remove all Wound Markers from Cornelius Breech.

name: Iron Lich Viscerot

abilities.name: Dismissive Strider
abilities.description: Iron Lich Viscerot can move through Small and Medium figures, does not take leaving engagement attacks from Small or Medium figures, and can target and attack non-adjacent figures while only engaged with Small or Medium figures.

abilities.name: Vile Injection
abilities.description: Begin the game with 3 yellow Surge Markers on this Army Card. Once per turn, before moving another Eisenek figure within 5 clear sight spaces of Viscerot, you may remove a Surge Marker from this card to add 2 to that figure's Move and Attack Values until the end or turn.

abilities.name: Ironclad Puppeteer
abilities.description: After revealing an Order Marker on Viscerot and taking a turn with Viscerot, you may take a turn with another Unique Eisenek Hero or Squad you control.

pack: Iron Lich Viscerot and Necrotech Wraithriders

name: Necrotech Wraithriders

abilities.name: Chain Grab 9
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking with the Necrotech Wraithriders, one at a time, each Wraithriders may choose an enemy or Small or Medium figure within 3 clear sight spaces whose level is no more than 11 levels above that Wraithrider's level or 6 levels below that Wraithrider's level. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 9 or higher, place the chosen figure on any empty same-level space adjacent to that Wraithrider. Figures moved by Chain Grab do not take leaving engagement attacks. A figure can only be moved by Chain Grab once each turn.

abilities.name: Rolling Movement
abilities.description: A Necrotech Wraithrider cannot move onto a space more than 2 levels above its level.

pack: Iron Lich Viscerot and Necrotech Wraithriders

abilities.name: Hawni's Darkness
abilities.description: When you reveal an Order Marker, you may also reveal the "X" Order Marker on Glinerva the Kyrie Warrior to activate Hawni's Darkness. Until you next reveal an Order Marker, Glinerva and all Small, Medium, and Large figures within 5 spaces of her cannot target or be targeted by non-adjacent figures with a normal or special attacks.

abilities.name: Concealment 17
abilities.description: If Glinerva is targeted and receives one or more wounds from an attacking figure who is not adjacent, you must roll the 20-sided die. Count the minimum number of spaces between the attacker and Glinerva. Add this number to your die roll. If you roll a 17 or higher, ignore any wounds Glinerva just received.

abilities.name: Witchcraft Telekinesis
abilities.description: After moving and before attacking, you may choose up to 2 different Small or Medium enemy figures within 5 clear sight spaces of Kilkorax the Kyrie Warrior. One at a time, roll the 20-sided die for each chosen figure. If the chosen figure is a Squad figure and you roll an 8 or higher, you may place the chosen figure onto a same-level space adjacent to Kilkorax. If the chosen figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 17 or higher, you may place the chosen figure onto a same-level space adjacent to Kilkorax. Figures moved by Witchcraft Telekinesis never take leaving engagement attacks.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: Once per turn, after attacking with Mielki the Kyrie Warrior, she may make one additional normal attack.

abilities.name: Spear of Sankari
abilities.description: When Mielki destroys a figure with a normal attack, you may choose a Small or Medium friendly figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Meilki. Remove a Wound Marker from the chosen figure. Mielki cannot heal herself with Spear of Sankari, and it cannot be used when destroying a destructible object.

abilities.name: Heart Finder Spear 12
abilities.description: Before attacking with Queen Qhyrion, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 12 or higher, a figure attacked by Queen Qhyrion may roll no more than 1 die for defense.

abilities.name: Amulet of Paivatar
abilities.description: When a Kyrie you control who follows Ullar within 6 clear sight spaces of Xiamara the Kyrie Warrior receives one or more wounds, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll an 8-16, ignore all but one wound just received. If you roll a 17 or higher, ignore all wounds just received. Amulet or Paivatar does not affect Xiamara.
